title: Good Samaritan Law
rights: A Good Samaritan (bystander who helps an accident victim) cannot be forced to reveal their identity or personal details
Protection from civil and criminal liability for taking a victim to the hospital
Hospitals cannot demand payment or delay treatment while waiting for police
Right to choose not to be a witness in the legal case
avoid: Do not hesitate to help a victim due to fear of police harassment
Do not move a victim with a suspected spinal injury unless they are in immediate life-threatening danger (e.g., vehicle on fire)
